title: 雨天窗景（單一場景真動態）
video_prompt: Static camera shot of raindrops sliding down a window pane at dusk, warm blurred city lights bokeh in the background, a steaming mug on the windowsill in soft focus, water drops trickling and merging on the glass, cozy cinematic atmosphere, photorealistic, no camera movement
negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, people, hands, camera shake, fast motion, scene change, cartoon, illustration, low quality, distortion
